title: Global Bioenergies is Looking For a Buyer
content: Despite all the efforts and discussions established over the last few months with major industrial players, the Company acknowledges that it has been unable to find strategic investors to finance the continuation of its business. At the date of publication of this press release, the Company has a gross cash position of 3.0 million euros. As a reminder, the 13.1 million euros in bank debt recorded at December 31, 2024 remain fully on the balance sheet, thanks to the deferral of repayments obtained on a month-by-month basis with the Companyâ€™s bank creditors.
author: Analysts Account
